item.title: New Imperatives of Care for a Sustainable Life Equilibrium: Groundwork of a Phenomenological Ethics in the Age of Autotelic Technology
item.description: Citation: Barbagallo, E., & Joisten, K. (manuscript under review by Global Philosophy). New Imperatives of Care for a Sustainable Life Equilibrium: Groundwork of a Phenomenological Ethics in the Age of Autotelic Technology.

item.title: Technological Embeddedness without Ethical Embeddedness? A Contribution to a Technoethics of Embedded Technologies
item.description: Citation: Barbagallo, E., & Joisten, K. (manuscript submitted by Continental Philosophy Review). Technological Embeddedness without Ethical Embeddedness? A Contribution to a Technoethics of Embedded Technologies.
